description:
Advances: mutagen.coverage, mutagen.mutation_pipeline

**SPIKE** (time-boxed: half-day). Decide the disposition of test/mutagen_ex/end_to_end_test.exs Scenario 7 (`:ecto_user_scenario`), which is currently `@tag :skip` with a fresh note from `.13` ("cover-instrumentation issue unrelated to this tickets Code.Server-lock fix").

Closes:
- **F12** (HIGH, second half — `:literal_floor_scenario` already un-skipped by `.16`)

The scenario gates the Spike-I bytecode-identical-restore invariant against macro-heavy DSLs (Ecto, Phoenix). Without it, the project ships v1 with no green coverage on its most load-bearing claim.

## Spike output

This is an investigation ticket, not a fix ticket. Half-day time box. Output is one of:

**Option A — fold into `.29` (F23 combine baseline+coverage instrumented run):**
The root cause is `:cover.compile_beam` not producing bytecode-identical output for Ecto-style schema macros. Document the deferral target; close `.19` as decided. The un-skip happens in `.29`.

**Option B — open `.19b` as a concrete fix ticket:**
The root cause is standalone (e.g. ExUnit setup ordering, fixture pollution, an EctoUser-specific macro that needs special handling). Open `.19b` with a focused fix plan; un-skip during `.19b` implementation.

**Option C — write a non-:cover parallel scenario:**
Exercise bytecode-identity restore against a macro-heavy module without going through :cover. Document the :cover + Ecto interaction as a known limitation but unblock the Spike-I evidence at .19s scope. ~2 hours work.

Any output updates README "Known caveats" with the actual root cause and a concrete deferral target — not the current vague "cover-instrumentation issue unrelated."

## Verification

Investigation completes with one of A/B/C decided. Decision recorded as a comment on this ticket. README caveats updated. `.19b` opened if Option B.

## Allowed touches

- README.md, CHANGELOG.md (caveat language)
- test/mutagen_ex/end_to_end_test.exs (only if Option C; minimal scope)
- New scratch directory under priv/helper_scripts/ if needed for investigation

## Out of Scope

- Fixing the `:cover` + Ecto interaction in lib/ source — that lives in `.19b` (if Option B) or `.29` (if Option A)
- Refactoring the e2e suite beyond un-skipping if Option C

## Time budget

Hard cap: 4 hours. If no clear root cause emerges in 4 hours, default to Option A (fold into `.29`) and document the unknown as a deferred investigation. Set a timer.

## Merge gate

- [ ] Investigation conclusion recorded as a ticket comment
- [ ] README updated with root cause + deferral target
- [ ] `.19b` opened if Option B; otherwise this ticket is the terminal node
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE
title: DISCOVERY: :ecto_user_scenario @tag :skip — spike root cause, decide deferral or fix path
